title: Greedy Best-First Search Algorithm Flow
description: A visual representation of the steps involved in the Greedy Best-First Search algorithm, showing how nodes are selected and expanded based on a heuristic function.
relationships: Start Node is placed on the Open List
Node with lowest h(n) is selected from Open List as Current Node
If Current Node is Goal Node, path is reconstructed
Else, Current Node is moved to Closed List and its children are generated
Heuristic h(n) is calculated for each child node
Valid children are added to the Open List
